title: Use Substitution
text: To simplify the equation, use a substitution for the multiple angle term.

title: Adjust the Interval
text: When using a substitution like $$u=2x$$, remember to adjust the interval for u accordingly.

title: Find Solutions for Substituted Variable
text: Find all values of u in the adjusted interval that satisfy the equation.

title: Substitute Back and Solve
text: Now, substitute $$2x$$ back for u and solve for $$x$$ within the original interval.
